summary: Section 7.10 (formerly SEC-4.8) has already been comprehensively rewritten. All three issues from the curmudgeon batch are resolved: (1) The 50% vs ±1.7% contradiction is gone — current text correctly states 52% as the dome prediction and <0.01% daily as observed; (2) Aetheric refraction defense is fully addressed with a dedicated paragraph including the 1/cos(θ) precision argument and cross-references to Sections 1b and 7.2; (3) Redundancy with old 4.5.4 is resolved — Section 7.10 focuses on observational test ("anyone with a camera") while Section 2.4 handles internal self-contradiction. Additionally, the W021 smoking gun, physical altitude deepening, and annual vs daily distinction are all present. No expansion needed.
